allow: PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/admin/login" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content | Select-String "Sign In" | Select-Object -First 3)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/admin" -UseBasicParsing -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "StatusCode via exception: $\(if \($_.Exception.Response\) { $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__ } else { 'unknown' }\)"; $r)

PowerShell($resp = try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/admin" -UseBasicParsing -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction Stop } catch { $_.Exception.Response }; Write-Host "StatusCode: $\($resp.StatusCode.value__\)"; Write-Host "Location: $\($resp.Headers['Location']\)")
